title: Prevent a second lookup of user for image volumes
body:
Instead of forcing another user lookup when mounting image volumes, just use the information we looked up when we started generating the spec.

This may resolve #1817

LGTM but I am not sure it fixes #1817 as it seems like a race-condition that might blow up somewhere else once this PR gets merged.
The good news is there are seemingly only two places we need to read /etc/passwd in the run path, and this is the second of the two... Everything else reading passwd should be strictly optional
Looks like access.redhat.com is having issues, hence our flake
One nit, otherwise LGTM.  F28 Cloud is unhappy yet again.
fix tom's comment and ill merge
Can we get a comment on https://bugs.launchpad.net/tripleo/+bug/1803544 when this fix is released and available for consumption on by tripleo jobs?
